seoTitle: South Talwood vs South Townsville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Talwood and South Townsville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Talwood vs South Townsville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Talwood and South Townsville.
heading: South Talwood vs South Townsville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Talwood, Queensland and South Townsville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Townsville has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Talwood (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Talwood or South Townsville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Talwood has a flood risk score of 56/100, while South Townsville scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Talwood scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. South Townsville scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Talwood or South Townsville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Townsville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
